title: L9 Preflight Expected Contract (blueprint)
description: The optional expected-repo blueprint passed to evaluate_preflight.py via --expected. It supplies Gate 2 identity, Gate 4 foundations, Gate 5 toolchain, and Gate 6 packages. It is AUTHORITY LEVEL 3 — below verified evidence: where the contract and the probe disagree, evidence wins and the gate returns `adapt` (fix the blueprint), never `blocked` (fail the repo).

repo.description: Expected repo identifier (matched as a substring of the origin URL / root).

foundations.description: Paths Gate 4 expects to resolve. Missing core (pyproject.toml, tests) -> blocked; missing non-core with an alternate layout -> adapt.

packages.description: Importable packages Gate 6 expects. A package absent from the repo -> adapt (foreign package).

test_tools.description: Tools Gate 5 requires, e.g. [pytest, ruff, mypy]. A required tool the repo does not define, when the repo defines its own -> adapt.
